failures.description: The agent failed to include item_id 5312063289 even though the ProductCatalogSearch result showed it was available, had bamboo deck material, was a Skateboard, and cost 195.15, which is greater than 194.56.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify all available Skateboards with deck material=bamboo costing more than $194.56. The tool output at index 3 contained all needed information. At index 4, the agent synthesized an answer from that tool output but omitted item_id 5312063289, whose price is 195.15 and therefore satisfies the threshold. This is not an invalid tool call, unsupported intent, or underspecified request; it is an incorrect use of relevant tool output.
